title: Advice Surgeries - Afzal Khan
meta_description: Labour MP for Manchester Rusholme covering Ardwick, Fallowfield, Hulme, Moss Side, Rusholme and Whalley Range
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Afzal Khan Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate News News Subscribe to my newsletter Parliament & Policy Parliamentary Record All-Party Parliamentary Groups Schools Visiting Parliament Visiting Parliament Pride in Place Pride in Place Updates Frequently Asked Questions Help & Advice Food Support in Manchester Housing & Homelessness Support Immigration Support Mental Health Support Domestic Abuse and Gender Based Violence Cost of Living Support Information needed for contacting me Advice Surgeries Emergency Support Local Councillors Useful Links Contact Me About Afzal Acceptable Behaviour Policy Privacy More Search Search the website Search Menu Advice Surgeries I hold regular advice surgeries around the Manchester Rusholme constituency for those who are in need of support. These surgeries are only available by appointment and fill up quickly, so book in by emailing my office at [email protected] or call 0161 226 5546 and leave a voicemail with the information below. Please include your full name, address and post code, contact phone number and some details about your case. Contact details Manchester M16 8BP, UK View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Y. ElGabry on behalf of Afzal Khan, both of MLP, Unit 1, Wesley Centre, Hulme, Manchester, M15 5BP. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
